last_worker_summary: I rewrote `tests/board/toolbar.filter.button.spec.mjs` replacing the `getByRole` name-match approach (which can be satisfied via fallback accessible-name computation against the live Jira) with three **direct `aria-label` attribute assertions**: a CSS suffix selector `button[aria-label$=" filters applied"]`, an exact `toHaveAttribute('aria-label', '0 filters applied')` on the testId-anchored element, and a regex variant `toHaveAttribute('aria-label', /^\d+ filters applied$/)` — all of which fail immediately when the attribute is changed to anything like `"Filter options"`.
mutation_failure_reason: saboteur declined to edit (feature may not live in src/); mutation contract not verified
